integrity.description: The agent linked existing records instead of creating new ones.

integrity.description: The results are shown within the genuine CRM application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Opportunity is exactly 'Cloud Migration Phase 2'. The records to be linked are Contacts: 'Marcus Oyelaran' and 'Priya Chakraborty', Document: 'Cloud Security Addendum', and Product: 'Enterprise Cloud Server'. All these records were pre-injected into the system and must only be linked, not created from scratch.
